name: Sociopat
short_description: Sociopat is an absurd comedy driven game that combines point and click adventure with action packed FPS game. Play in a role of an anti-hero and do some mischievous acts, NOW!
detailed_description:
[SK]
Sociopat je absurdná komediálna hra, ktorá kombinuje point and click adventúru s akčnou hrou z pohľadu prvej osoby (FPS).
Hráč preberá kontorlu nad väzňom na úteku, ktorý spáchal rôzne zločiny, ku ktorým ho povzbudil netradičný démon.
Príbeh je ukotvený v trochu absurdnom univerze a dej napreduje riešením klasických dobrodružných úloh s pridanou akciou.
Ak si chcete vyskúšať hru za antihrdinu a robíť nejaké "nezbednosti", táto hra je práve pre vás.

Hra obsahuje len slovenský jazyk, mala by však osloviť aj českých hráčov.

[EN]
Sociopat is an absurd comedy driven game that combines point and click adventure with action packed first person game.
The player takes role of an escaped prisoner who commited various crimes, which were encouraged by an unconventional demon.
Story is anchored in a bit absurd universe and the story is progressed by solving classic adventure tasks with addition of action.
If you like to play in a role of an anti-hero and do some mischievous acts, this game is for you.

The game features Slovak language only but it should appeal also to Czech players.

supported_languages:
Slovak*, Czech*, English
*languages with full audio support
